messages.content: I know you're probably just spamming this link out to everyone you follow, but I did have a listen to some of your music last night. Had not heard of you before. Was decent. :) if you were in Australia I'd photograph you performing.

Thank you - I much appreciate the follow. I have a pretty damn emotional music video out lol...its like a 5 minute walk from despair and misery to hope to change.... lol, I'd love to know what you think. People seem either love it or hate it...but If you are feeling up to the task of getting a little down and then a little up (like an audio speedball lol) ...you can find the YouTube Link in my bio. Thanks much :)
